en: Next question. And if it is, why is a giraffe wearing a top hat? Don't ask me, man.
Go ask a giraffe. Coach. Yeah, Marcus.
Marcus Adebayo, The Independent. Grads on the new gig.
Thank you. What do you got for them? Do you have any response to the comments made earlier today
ko: 오늘 당신의 전 보조 코치인 네이선 셸리의 발언에 대한 반응이 있나요?

en: by your former assistant coach, Nathan Shelley?
ko: 오늘 당신의 전 보조 코치인 네이선 셸리의 발언에 대한 반응이 있나요?

en: Yes, I do. I thought it was hilarious.
I mean, he came and got him, didn't he? No doubt about that.
Hey, but that's Nate the Great for you. You know, he's the same way on the pitch.
ko: 하지만 그게 바로 네이트 더 그레이트야.

en: You know, he'll find the tiniest little weakness in a team and just want to attack that.
ko: 팀의 가장 작은 약점을 찾아서 공격하고 싶어 해.

en: Yeah, I mean, he's a junkyard dog, man. And smart.
They're real lucky to have him over there at West Ham. I wish him the best of luck.
Come on, man. Come on. All right.
I guess I'm a little surprised that's all you could come up with, especially against me.
